content:
Your cover letter is well-structured and professional. You provide a good overview of your qualifications, but one area where you could improve is customization—right now, the letter could feel more tailored to the specific company and role. Adding a sentence or two that connects your skills to the company’s mission or values would strengthen it. Additionally, your closing paragraph could include a stronger call to action, such as requesting an interview.

Your resume is clear and well-organized. The skills section is strong, but your work experience section could benefit from more quantifiable achievements—adding specific numbers or measurable outcomes would make your experience stand out more. Additionally, ensure that formatting is consistent throughout, particularly with spacing and punctuation.

With these small refinements, your materials will be even stronger. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 78/100
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 16 (chunk 16/22)
